schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
schemes.objective: Providing financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Students with >80% marks and family income < 2.5 LPA

schemes.benefits: Up to ₹20,000 per annum

schemes.name: PM YASASVI Scheme
schemes.objective: Scholarships for OBC, EBC, and DNT students.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Class 9 & 11 students with income limits

schemes.name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
schemes.objective: Financial support for girls in technical education.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Diploma/degree students

schemes.benefits: ₹50,000 per annum for every year of study.

schemes.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena
schemes.objective: Full fee reimbursement for students pursuing higher education.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Students pursuing ITI, Polytechnic, Degree, Engineering, Medicine. Family income < ₹2.5 Lakhs per annum.

schemes.benefits: Full fee reimbursement paid directly to colleges or mother's account.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through Jagananna Vidya Deevena portal or local secretariat.

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.objective: Promotes girl child education and protection.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All girl children and their families.

schemes.benefits: Financial support, education support, and welfare of the girl child.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through local Anganwadi or government hospitals.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.objective: Savings account for girl children with high interest benefits.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Parents can open account for girl child below 10 years.

schemes.benefits: High interest rate, tax benefits, and maturity at age 21.
schemes.applicationProcess: Open account at any post office or authorized bank.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.objective: Financial support for pregnant women.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Pregnant women and lactating mothers.

schemes.benefits: ₹5,000 cash incentive in three installments.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply at the nearest Anganwadi Centre.

schemes.name: Stand Up India Scheme
schemes.objective: Loans for women entrepreneurs.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Women entrepreneurs setting up greenfield enterprises.

schemes.benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply online or directly through bank branches.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.objective: Monthly pension after retirement.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Indian citizens between 18 to 40 years of age.

schemes.benefits: Fixed pension of ₹1000 to ₹5000 per month after age 60.

schemes.name: Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
schemes.objective: Secure investment with fixed returns.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Individuals aged 60 years or above.

schemes.benefits: High interest rate on deposits, tax benefits.
schemes.applicationProcess: Open account at Post Office or authorized banks.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
schemes.objective: Pension support for elderly citizens below poverty line.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: BPL individuals aged 60 years or older.

schemes.benefits: Monthly pension varying by age and state.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Municipality.

schemes.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
schemes.objective: Financial support for agriculture expenses.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers who own agricultural land in Andhra Pradesh and belong to eligible farming families.

schemes.benefits: ₹13,500 financial support is given to farmers every year.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through village or ward secretariats or agriculture offices.

schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.objective: ₹6000 yearly financial support to farmers.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Small and marginal farmers who own cultivable land.

schemes.benefits: ₹6000 per year financial support is given to farmers in three installments.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply online through the official portal of Government of India or through local agriculture offices.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.objective: Insurance protection for crop loss.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers who grow notified crops and have agricultural land.

schemes.benefits: Provides crop insurance to farmers for losses caused by floods, droughts, pests, or natural disasters.
schemes.applicationProcess: Enroll through banks, agriculture offices, or online portals before the cropping season.

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.objective: Soil quality testing and recommendations.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All farmers who have agricultural land.

schemes.benefits: Soil Health Card provided with recommendations for fertilizers and nutrients.
schemes.applicationProcess: Approach local agriculture department or soil testing centers.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
schemes.objective: Easy agricultural loans for farmers.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers who own or cultivate agricultural land and are engaged in farming activities.

schemes.benefits: Low-interest loans for seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and other farming needs.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through banks or cooperative societies.

schemes.name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
schemes.objective: Improves irrigation facilities for farmers.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers needing water access for agriculture.

schemes.benefits: Subsidies for irrigation equipment and water conservation.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
schemes.objective: Health insurance coverage for families and senior citizens.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Poor, deprived rural families and identified occupational category of urban workers' families.

schemes.benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.applicationProcess: Identify eligibility on PMJAY portal or at empanelled hospitals.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
schemes.objective: Reducing maternal and neonatal mortality.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Pregnant women from below poverty line (BPL) households.

schemes.benefits: Cash assistance for delivery and post-delivery care.
schemes.applicationProcess: Register at government health centers or through ASHA workers.

schemes.name: Skill India Mission
schemes.objective: Training programs for youth.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Youth seeking skill training.

schemes.benefits: Free skill training and certification leading to employment.
schemes.applicationProcess: Register at nearest skill training center.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
schemes.objective: Skill certification scheme to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Any youth of Indian nationality.

schemes.benefits: Free short duration skill training, certification and placement assistance.

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
schemes.objective: Enhancing livelihood security in rural areas.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.

schemes.benefits: At least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply for Job Card at local Gram Panchayat.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.objective: Ensuring access to financial services, namely Banking/ Savings & Deposit Accounts, Remittance, Credit, Insurance, Pension.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Any Indian citizen.

schemes.benefits: Zero balance account, accidental insurance cover of ₹2 lakh, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000.
schemes.applicationProcess: Open account at any bank branch or Bank Mitra.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
schemes.objective: Loans up to 10 lakhs to the non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity.

schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans categorized as Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun.

schemes.name: Public Provident Fund (PPF)
schemes.objective: Savings-cum-tax-saving instrument.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Any Indian resident individual.

schemes.benefits: Attractive interest rate, fully exempt from tax.
schemes.applicationProcess: Open account at Post Office or authorized banks.

schemes.name: INSPIRE Scholarship
schemes.objective: Attract talent to science streams.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Top 1% students in Class 12 pursuing science.

schemes.benefits: ₹5,000/month for 5 years.

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme
schemes.objective: Support SC/ST students for post-matriculation studies.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: SC/ST students studying post-matric level.

schemes.benefits: Covers tuition, maintenance, and other allowances.

schemes.name: National Means Cum Merit Scholarship
schemes.objective: Prevent dropout of meritorious students at Class 8.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Students from Class 9-12 with income below ₹1.5 lakh.

schemes.benefits: ₹12,000 per year.

schemes.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships
schemes.objective: Scholarships for college and university students.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Students above 80th percentile in Class 12 with family income below ₹4.5 lakh.

schemes.name: Eklavya Model Residential Schools
schemes.objective: Quality education for tribal children.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: ST students in remote tribal areas.

schemes.benefits: Free residential schooling with quality education.

schemes.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra Scheme
schemes.objective: Empower rural women through community participation.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Rural women needing skill development and awareness.

schemes.benefits: Skill development, employment, digital literacy support.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.objective: Provide LPG connections to BPL households.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Women from BPL households.

schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection and first refill subsidy.

schemes.name: One Stop Centre Scheme
schemes.objective: Support women affected by violence.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Women affected by violence, distress or in need of help.

schemes.benefits: Medical, legal, psychological support and shelter.

schemes.name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
schemes.objective: Safe accommodation for working women.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Working women with income up to ₹50,000/month.

schemes.benefits: Subsidized safe hostel accommodation.

schemes.name: Mahila E-Haat
schemes.objective: Online marketing platform for women entrepreneurs.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Women entrepreneurs and SHGs.

schemes.benefits: Free online platform to sell products directly.

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.objective: Promote organic farming.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers willing to adopt organic farming in clusters.

schemes.benefits: ₹50,000/hectare over 3 years for organic inputs.

schemes.name: National Agriculture Market (eNAM)
schemes.objective: Online trading portal for agricultural commodities.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All farmers with agricultural produce.

schemes.benefits: Better price discovery and access to more buyers.

schemes.name: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
schemes.objective: Support dairy entrepreneurs.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers, entrepreneurs, NGOs for dairy units.

schemes.benefits: 25-33% subsidy on dairy projects.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.objective: Incentivize states to increase agriculture investment.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers through state government projects.

schemes.benefits: Funding for agricultural infrastructure and projects.

schemes.name: National Beekeeping and Honey Mission
schemes.objective: Promote beekeeping for livelihood.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Farmers and beekeepers across India.

schemes.benefits: Training, equipment subsidies, and market support.

schemes.name: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
schemes.objective: Assured pension for senior citizens.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Senior citizens aged 60 and above.

schemes.benefits: Assured 7.4% return and monthly pension.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
schemes.objective: Assistive devices for senior citizens.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: BPL senior citizens needing assistive devices.

schemes.benefits: Free aids like walking sticks, wheelchairs, hearing aids.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through district social welfare office.

schemes.name: Annapurna Scheme
schemes.objective: Food security for senior citizens not covered by pension.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Senior citizens eligible for pension but not receiving it.

schemes.benefits: 10 kg of food grain free per month.

schemes.name: Reverse Mortgage Loan Scheme
schemes.objective: Provide regular income to senior citizens against property.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Senior citizens owning a residential property.

schemes.benefits: Regular monthly income without leaving the home.

schemes.name: National Health Mission
schemes.objective: Strengthen healthcare delivery across India.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All citizens, with priority for rural and vulnerable populations.

schemes.benefits: Free essential medicines, diagnostics, and healthcare services.

schemes.name: Ayushman CAPF Scheme
schemes.objective: Health coverage for CAPF personnel.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: CAPF personnel and their dependents.

schemes.benefits: Cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.

schemes.name: TB Harega Desh Jeetega
schemes.objective: Eliminate tuberculosis from India by 2025.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All TB patients in India.

schemes.benefits: Free diagnosis, treatment, and ₹500/month nutritional support.

schemes.name: Mission Indradhanush
schemes.objective: Universal immunization for children and pregnant women.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Children under 2 years and pregnant women.

schemes.benefits: Free vaccination against 12 diseases.
schemes.applicationProcess: Visit nearest Anganwadi or health center.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.objective: Free antenatal care for pregnant women.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Pregnant women in second and third trimester.

schemes.benefits: Free comprehensive antenatal checkup on 9th of every month.
schemes.applicationProcess: Visit government health facility on the 9th of every month.

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.objective: Build a strong startup ecosystem in India.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Startups recognized by DPIIT.

schemes.benefits: Tax exemptions, fast-track patent application, funding support.

schemes.name: Digital India
schemes.objective: Transform India into a digitally empowered society.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All citizens and businesses.

schemes.benefits: Digital infrastructure, digital literacy programs, e-services.

schemes.name: Make in India
schemes.objective: Encourage manufacturing and investment in India.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Businesses and entrepreneurs in manufacturing sector.

schemes.benefits: Ease of doing business, investment facilitation, incentives.

schemes.name: PM Employment Generation Programme
schemes.objective: Generate employment in non-farm sector.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Individuals above 18 with minimum VIII pass for projects above ₹10 lakh.

schemes.benefits: Subsidy of 15-35% on project cost from ₹10 lakh to ₹50 lakh.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through KVIC or Khadi institutions.

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
schemes.objective: Skill and place rural poor youth.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Rural youth aged 15-35 from poor families.

schemes.benefits: Free residential skill training and placement assistance.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
schemes.objective: Housing for all by providing affordable homes.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: EWS/LIG households without a pucca house.

schemes.benefits: Subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh on home loans.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through local municipal body or pmaymis.gov.in

schemes.name: Rajiv Awas Yojana
schemes.objective: Slum-free India by providing housing to slum dwellers.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Slum dwellers and urban poor.

schemes.benefits: Subsidized housing and in-situ slum rehabilitation.

schemes.name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme
schemes.objective: Interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: EWS (income up to ₹3L), LIG (₹3-6L), MIG-I (₹6-12L), MIG-II (₹12-18L).

schemes.benefits: Interest subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through banks/HFCs linked to NHB.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.objective: Life insurance for all bank account holders.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Bank account holders aged 18-50.

schemes.benefits: ₹2 lakh life cover at just ₹436/year.
schemes.applicationProcess: Enroll through your bank or insurance company.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.objective: Accidental death and disability insurance.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Bank account holders aged 18-70.

schemes.benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental cover at just ₹20/year.

schemes.name: National Pension System
schemes.objective: Pension savings scheme for all citizens.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Indian citizens aged 18-65.

schemes.benefits: Pension corpus on retirement with tax benefits.
schemes.applicationProcess: Open NPS account through any Point of Presence (PoP).

schemes.name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.objective: Pension for small and marginal farmers.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Small and marginal farmers aged 18-40.

schemes.benefits: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60.

schemes.name: Integrated Child Development Services
schemes.objective: Holistic development of children under 6.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Children 0-6 years and pregnant/lactating mothers.

schemes.benefits: Nutrition, health checkup, immunization, pre-school education.

schemes.name: PM POSHAN (Mid Day Meal Scheme)
schemes.objective: Nutritional support to school children.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Students in government and government-aided schools.

schemes.benefits: Free cooked nutritious meal every school day.

schemes.name: Balika Samridhi Yojana
schemes.objective: Improve the status of the girl child.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Girl children born in BPL families on or after 15 Aug 1997.

schemes.benefits: ₹500 at birth and annual scholarships up to ₹2,000.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through Anganwadi or health center.

schemes.name: POSHAN Abhiyaan
schemes.objective: Reduce malnutrition among children and women.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Children under 6, pregnant women and lactating mothers.

schemes.benefits: Nutritional interventions and supplementation.

schemes.name: Accessible India Campaign
schemes.objective: Create barrier-free access for persons with disabilities.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Persons with disabilities.

schemes.benefits: Accessible public infrastructure, transport, and digital resources.

schemes.name: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme
schemes.objective: NGO support for rehabilitation of persons with disabilities.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Persons with disabilities covered by NGO projects.

schemes.benefits: Rehabilitation services through NGOs.

schemes.name: Unique Disability ID Project
schemes.objective: Standardized disability certification across India.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: All persons with disabilities in India.

schemes.benefits: Digital disability certificate recognized nationwide.

schemes.name: ADIP Scheme
schemes.objective: Assistive devices for persons with disabilities.

eligibility.criteriaDescription: Persons with disabilities with income below ₹20,000/month.

schemes.benefits: Free or subsidized assistive devices.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply through ALIMCO or authorized NGOs.
